translations.en: a plump older woman with an apron about her waist.
translations.zh: 一位圓胖的年長女子，腰間繫著圍裙。

translations.en: "Oh, good, you've come back. Perhaps for some @pie?" She smiles broadly.
translations.zh: 「哦，好，汝回來了，或許是想要些@pie（派）？」她笑開了臉。

translations.en: "Hello," she says in a scratchy yet firm voice. "What can I do for ye?"
translations.zh: 「你好，」她用沙啞卻有力的嗓音說道，「有何需要效勞？」

translations.en: "Dorin...and yours?"
translations.zh: 「朵琳……汝呢？」

translations.en: "That's nice."
translations.zh: 「真好。」

translations.en: "She was a wonderful cook. Taught me all I know."
translations.zh: 「她是個出色的廚師，把在下所知的一切都傳授給了在下。」

translations.en: "It was my @mother's name."
translations.zh: 「那是在下@mother（母親）的名字。」

translations.en: "At the moment, only Meri and I are here, so I guess I must conduct the @business."
translations.zh: 「目前只有梅里和在下在這裡，所以在下想是得自己打理@business（生意）了。」

translations.en: "We are shepherds. We sell @wool."
translations.zh: 「我們是牧羊人，我們販售@wool（羊毛）。」

translations.en: "He and I like to care for the less fortunate people in town. I like him alot."
translations.zh: 「他和在下都喜歡照顧鎮上不那麼幸運的人，在下很喜歡他。」

translations.en: "Old Shorty, eh? He's actually quite a nice little man."
translations.zh: 「老矮冬瓜？他其實是個挺不錯的小個子。」

translations.en: "A bit caught up in herself, but likable."
translations.zh: 「有點自我中心，但還算討人喜歡。」

translations.en: "Poor little guy. He's afraid of the dark, or so I'm told."
translations.zh: 「可憐的小個子，聽說他怕黑。」

translations.en: "He has the best flour in all the land."
translations.zh: 「他有全境最好的麵粉。」

translations.en: "She's my little angel. If you see her around here, tell her I have errands to run."
translations.zh: 「她是在下的小天使，若汝在附近見到她，告訴她在下有差事要辦。」

translations.en: She winces at his name. "He is a hard worker, but sometimes his smell is quite strong."
translations.zh: 她一聽到他的名字就皺眉。「他是個勤奮的工人，但有時氣味相當強烈。」

translations.en: "I like to go on walks with Uby. He has such an interesting life."
translations.zh: 「在下喜歡和烏比一起散步，他的生活如此有趣。」

translations.en: "Oh, dear, I'm afraid you just missed the last piece."
translations.zh: 「哎喲，恐怕汝剛好錯過了最後一塊。」

translations.en: "But I'm baking another, and I'll be sure to save you a slice!"
translations.zh: 「但在下正在烤新的，一定給汝留一塊！」

translations.en: "Yes, I'm baking the nicest shepherd's pie right now."
translations.zh: 「是的，在下正在烤一個最棒的牧羊人派。」

translations.en: "It's not done yet, but you can have a slice as soon as it is!"
translations.zh: 「還沒烤好，但一烤好汝就可以來拿一塊！」

translations.en: She wipes her hand on her apron, and then waves it at you.
translations.zh: 她在圍裙上擦擦手，然後朝汝揮了揮。

translations.en: "Sorry, don't know about any $Z."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，在下不了解$Z的事。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "We charge 5 gold for a bale of wool. Would you like some?"
translations.zh: 「一捆羊毛5金，汝想要嗎？」

translations.en: "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來已裝得滿滿的了。」

translations.en: "Very good." After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the wool.
translations.zh: 「甚好。」收下$Y的金幣後，$N遞出羊毛。

translations.en: "I'm sorry, but you don't seem to have enough money."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，汝的金幣似乎不足。」

translations.en: "It was a pleasure doing business with you."
translations.zh: 「很高興與汝交易。」

translator_notes: 105 Dorin: 鴉爪鎮牧羊人兼烤派高手，慈祥老婦。與提默共同照顧弱勢。女兒Meri(Merideth)讓她引以為傲。賣羊毛。
